about_ivs_desc: Learn about our mission, vision, and core values.
about_us_content: At IVS, we believe in the power of education to shape the future. Our mission is to provide advanced educational and technological solutions, helping students develop comprehensively and be ready for the challenges of the 21st century.
about_us_intro: IVS JSC, or Integrate Vision Synergy Trading Services Joint Stock Company, was established with the mission of bringing comprehensive, high-quality educational and technological solutions to Vietnam. We are proud to be a reliable partner for many educational organizations, businesses, and individuals.
about_us_sub: Established with the mission of creating positive change through education and technology, IVS continuously strives to provide high-quality training and consulting solutions.
about_us_text: Established with the mission of creating positive change through education and technology, IVS continuously strives to provide high-quality training and consulting solutions.
academy_card_description: Discover language courses, life skills, and international certificate preparation at IVS Academy.
academy_description: IVS Academy is a cradle for talent, offering diverse courses from foreign languages, life skills, to international certificate preparation. With a team of experienced teachers and modern teaching methods, we are committed to providing the best learning environment for students.
academy_intro_text: Welcome to IVS Academy, where knowledge and skills take flight. We provide diverse, high-quality training programs, from English, STEAM to essential soft skills for the future.

ai_thinking_description: Equip yourself with AI thinking to lead in the digital era. This course not only teaches you about technology but also how to apply AI thinking to solve complex problems in work and life.
apply_now_text: Become a part of the IVS team. We are always looking for passionate and creative talents.
apps_card_description: Experience educational applications developed by IVS, making learning and management easier.
author: Author
banner_subtitle: Trusted partner for education and technology solutions

ceo_message_content: On behalf of IVS, I sincerely thank our partners, customers, and all employees for accompanying us. We are committed to continuously striving to bring the best values, contributing to the overall development of the community.
careers_card_description: Join the IVS team to create new values for education with us.
careers_desc: Explore career opportunities at IVS and become a part of our dynamic, creative team.
careers_intro: At IVS, we believe that people are our most valuable asset. We always welcome talents with the same passion, enthusiasm, and desire to contribute to the development of education and technology. Join our team to create sustainable values together.
company_name: Integrate Vision Synergy Trading Services Joint Stock Company (IVS JSC)
company_profile_desc: Learn more about IVS JSC, a leading company in education and technology in Vietnam.
consulting_solutions_desc: We provide in-depth consulting services on education, technology, and management, helping partners optimize operations and achieve strategic goals.

contact_intro: We are always ready to hear from you. Whether you have questions about services, need technical support, or want to collaborate, do not hesitate to contact IVS.

core_values_content: Quality - Dedication - Innovation - Equality. These are the guiding values for all IVS activities, from product development to customer service.
document_library_desc: Access our rich document library, including forms, guides, and important reference materials.
education_solutions_desc: From curriculum development, teacher training to providing native English teachers, IVS offers comprehensive and effective educational solutions.
edutech_solutions_desc: Pioneering the application of technology in education, we develop smart learning platforms and applications, bringing groundbreaking learning experiences.
english_placement_test_desc: Take our placement test to determine your current English level and find the most suitable course for you.

establishment_consulting_desc: Do you want to establish a foreign language, IT, or life skills center? We provide comprehensive consulting services, from legal procedures, curriculum development to recruitment and operation.

ivs_academy_desc_1: Provides foreign language courses, life skills, international certificate preparation.
ivs_academy_description: Enhance your knowledge and skills with diverse training programs at IVS Academy. We offer courses from language, soft skills to international certificate preparation.
ivs_academy_intro: IVS Academy is a leading training center, specializing in providing language courses, skills, and international certificate preparation. With modern teaching methods and dedicated teachers, we are committed to providing the best learning experience for students.
ivs_academy_title: IVS Academy - Where knowledge takes flight
ivs_apps_desc: Explore the IVS educational app ecosystem, designed to support more effective learning and management.
ivs_center_care_desc: Comprehensive center management solution, helping to automate operational procedures, student care, and financial management.
ivs_education_desc_1: Develop STEAM, K-12 curriculum according to international standards.
ivs_education_desc_2: Provide digital learning solutions and E-learning platforms.
ivs_education_desc_3: Organize training and professional development courses for teachers.
ivs_education_description: IVS Education focuses on researching and developing advanced curriculum (STEAM, K-12), providing digital transformation solutions for educational institutions, and teacher training.
ivs_education_intro: IVS Education specializes in researching and developing curriculum for all levels, from preschool to high school, while providing comprehensive digital transformation solutions for the education sector.
ivs_kinder_link_desc: Smart connection application between schools, teachers, and parents of preschool students, helping to update children's learning and development situation every day.
ivs_quick_test_desc: Platform for creating and managing online tests quickly and easily, supporting diverse question formats and providing detailed analytical reports.
ivs_solutions_card_desc: Discover comprehensive solutions in education, technology, and consulting provided by IVS.
international_partnerships_desc: We build a global network of partners, bringing opportunities for cooperation and sustainable development for educational organizations both domestically and internationally.
ivs_jsc_intro: IVS JSC (Integrate Vision Synergy Trading Services Joint Stock Company) is a leading provider of comprehensive education and technology solutions.
ivs_story_repository_desc: A repository of multimedia stories, helping children develop language, thinking, and imagination naturally and engagingly.
kindergarten_partnerships_desc: Comprehensive cooperation program with preschools, providing curriculum, teachers, and extracurricular activities according to international standards.
language_center_partnerships_desc: Cooperation with foreign language centers to enhance teaching quality, expand training programs, and apply modern technology.
learning_materials_desc: Access a rich library of learning materials, including lectures, videos, and practical exercises compiled by IVS experts.
legal_consulting_desc: Our team of lawyers and legal experts is ready to advise and support issues related to corporate law, investment, and intellectual property.
let_s_talk_dong_nai_desc: A community project to promote the learning and use of English in Dong Nai through interactive activities and exciting events.
middle_school_partnerships_desc: Training linkage program for middle and high school, focusing on academic English, STEAM, and essential skills for the future.
name: Name
news_archive_desc: Review past news and events from IVS and partners.
non_profit_desc: IVS is committed to contributing to the community through non-profit education projects, bringing knowledge to disadvantaged people.
our_partners_desc: We are proud to cooperate with reputable educational organizations and businesses both domestically and internationally to develop together and create sustainable values.
our_solutions_desc: IVS provides a comprehensive ecosystem of solutions, including education, technology, and consulting, to meet all the needs of customers and partners.
our_team_desc: Meet the team of experts, educators, and technology enthusiasts behind IVS's success.
our_team_intro: Our team is a combination of experience, creativity, and enthusiasm. We are proud to have leading experts in the fields of education, technology, and management, always ready to accompany your success.
partner_with_us_desc: We are always looking for opportunities to cooperate with organizations that share the same vision to create new values together. Contact us to become an IVS partner.
primary_school_partnerships_desc: Provides intensive English, STEAM, and life skills programs for primary schools, helping students develop comprehensively from the early years.
privacy_policy_desc: Read our privacy policy to understand how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
question: Question
r_and_d_curriculum_desc: Our R&D team continuously researches and develops new curriculum, integrating technology and advanced pedagogical methods.
hero_tagline: IVS JSC: EDUCATION, TECHNOLOGY & HR ECOSYSTEM
hero_description: IVS is a comprehensive education ecosystem, providing breakthrough solutions from language training, skills to strategic consulting for educational organizations.
hero_service_edu_sub: Foreign Teachers, International Programs & Strategic Consulting.
affiliates_subtitle: Each unit is an important piece, together creating IVS's comprehensive Technology - Education ecosystem.
unit_celestech_desc: Specialized unit in Web/App Design, Digital Transformation Consulting, Interior construction, and providing modern technology equipment (AI, VR/AR).
unit_consulting_desc: Provides in-depth consulting services on Operational Optimization, financial, and legal strategies, helping organizations develop sustainably and effectively.
unit_academy_desc: Foreign Language & Life Skills Linkage training center, providing high-quality international programs and teachers for educational institutions.
unit_education_desc: Specializes in curriculum development (R&D), compiling STEAM learning materials, Life Skills, and providing digital learning solutions (EdTech).
strength_description: We are committed to executing all your ideas. With specialized Hand-Code techniques, IVS Celestech can develop the most complex features, integrate multi-platform APIs, and ensure international-level performance and security.
digital_ecosystem_subtitle: Technology products designed to optimize management, automate processes, and enhance learning and entertainment experiences in the digital age.
app_english_desc: Integrated English learning platform for students, with e-books, AI practice, and gamification.
app_staysmart_desc: Integrated lodging management application, helping landlords simplify the management of room information, tenants, and contracts.
app_qlgx_desc: Supports Churches and Parishes in managing household information, making it easy to look up data on parishioners.
app_strivestreak_desc: Learning support application, helping to build habits, set goals, and maintain motivation through gamification and AI suggestions.
app_mandarin_desc: Comprehensive Chinese learning application based on HSK curriculum, ensuring a systematic learning path.
app_all_desc: We develop private management/process applications according to all requirements.
web_projects_title: IVS Celestech: Featured Web Design Projects
web_projects_subtitle: We design professional web solutions, optimizing user experience, suitable for all business sectors.
web_projects_cta_desc: Let our Hand-Code team turn challenges into reality.

edu_spotlight_subtitle: Enhance training quality, optimize operations, and ensure international human resources for our Partners.
edu_card_gvnn_desc: Supply high-quality foreign teachers (native/Filipino), support Work Permit and full legal procedures.
edu_card_tltt_desc: Full-package support for procedures, proposals, facilities, and initial operation for Foreign Language/Skills centers.
edu_card_lkth_desc: Provide STEAM, International Standard English (Cambridge/IELTS), and Life Skills programs for school levels.
edu_card_ccsp_desc: Linkage training for English Primary, Preschool Pedagogical Profession Certificates, Education Management for individuals and organizations.
edu_card_htqt_desc: Develop training programs with US, European partners (IIVSA), international summer camps, study abroad scholarships.
edu_card_devices_desc: Provide computers, office equipment, IT infrastructure solutions, and install smart classrooms (Apple, Japanese domestic).
edu_card_lkttnn_desc: Comprehensive cooperation: IVS brand franchising, curriculum transfer, foreign teacher supply, and operation consulting.
edu_card_eov_desc: International English academic competition (English Olympics of Vietnam) Empowering Young Leaders.

solutions_corporate_item3: HR strategy consulting and building a learning culture in the enterprise.
solutions_corporate_item4: Organize team-building and specialized training events.
solutions_corporate_item5: Provide Japanese domestic office equipment (printers, laptops, PCs).

solutions_individual_item3: Provide technology equipment (printers, laptops mostly Japanese domestic goods).
solutions_individual_item4: Short-term courses on soft skills, critical thinking.
ceo_section_title: Message & Capability Profile from IVS JSC
ceo_quote: We commit to dedicated contribution, tirelessly striving for the remarkable development of Vietnamese Education. Our strategic vision is to thoroughly optimize national resources, save costs for the country, and effectively transform investments that have not reached maximum efficiency. With a strong spirit of SYNERGY, we will enhance deep international cooperation, focusing on comprehensive support for domestic educational institutions, to build a solid, modern, and integrated education system.

company_intro_desc: IVS JSC is a pioneer in providing comprehensive and innovative education solutions in Vietnam, proud to be a key member of IIVSA – International Integrated Vision Synergy Alliance.
